summary: Re-review of the landing-page slice found fix 1 implemented correctly and consistently: `applyLang()` now updates `document.title`, `meta[name="description"]`, both `.lang` `aria-label`s, and all 8 `data-i18n-alt` images from dictionary keys in both languages. The vocabulary rebuttal is also consistent with the embedded PT copy, which intentionally preserves product/coinage terms such as `builders`, `Connectors`, `Vault`, `skill`, and `runtime`. No other material issues remain in `site/index.html` or `tests/e2e/landing.spec.ts`.
